prompt:
A photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a relaxed man in his early 30s leaning against a sun-warmed concrete wall outside a coffee shop in a modern city, mid-afternoon. He's caught mid-action popping ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE into his mouth, gummy held between thumb and index finger just past his slightly parted lips, the other hand loosely holding an open jar at his side. He wears a fitted slate-blue crewneck rolled up at the sleeves, slim dark olive trousers, a small woven leather strap watch, dark-brown stubble, easy half-smile, looking off to the side. The JAR he holds is from the provided reference image — a black plastic jar with bold teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel reading 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in a vertical teal strip, lid off, the jar's label clearly facing the camera. The jar must match the reference image — same shape, same label artwork, fully legible, recognizable as the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies product.

Background: a slightly out-of-focus urban scene — a brick or concrete wall, a hint of a bicycle rack or a planter, a faint reflection in a glass storefront. Warm late-afternoon sunlight bouncing off the buildings.

Lighting: directional warm golden-hour sunlight from the upper-right side, soft falloff to shadow on the left, with a cool blue rim-light reflecting off the city environment behind him. Color grade is warm and slightly saturated, editorial men's wellness campaign feel (Hims / Roman / Allbirds) — premium but approachable, NOT stock-photo cheesy.

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter portrait — man from waist up, gummy held in the upper-third near his face, jar prominent in his hand in the lower-third. Subject and product both clearly recognizable.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture and stubble, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers, gummy clearly held between thumb and index finger.
